_instructions:
Replace every value below with the Polish translation. Strip the "__TODO__ " prefix when you're done with that string (the importer skips values that still have it). Keep HTML tags exactly (, ,
  • ,

    ). Don't translate URLs or proper nouns (Universal Credit, NAWRA, entitledto). Right-to-left languages don't need any special markup — the renderer sets dir="rtl" automatically based on the file's language code.

nawra.hero_subtitle: __TODO__ Important news for parents and carers
nawra.intro_html: __TODO__ Every child whose family receives Universal Credit can get free school meals.
nawra.cta_primary_body_html: __TODO__ Sign up before the Autumn term starts so your child gets every free meal they're entitled to.
nawra.box1_title: __TODO__ If your child currently gets free school meals
nawra.box1_body_html:
__TODO__

From the 2026/27 school year, eligibility will be checked every year. In some areas your local authority will auto-enrol your child — otherwise make sure you claim again so your child keeps their free meals.
nawra.box2_title: __TODO__ If you receive Universal Credit but haven't claimed before
nawra.box2_body_html:
__TODO__

Your child is now eligible. Claim from 1 June for the start of September.
nawra.how_to_steps_html:
__TODO__
  • Download the form from your school's website
  • Or pick up a paper copy from the school office
nawra.cta_secondary_body_html: __TODO__ You may still be entitled. A free benefit calculator will tell you if you could qualify for Universal Credit and free school meals.
